title: Afarathu

{{Quote|Keiran Halcyon was a famed Corellian Jedi. He successfully put an end to the Selonian ''Afarathu'' sect and its marauding within the Corellian system.|[[Bodo Baas]]|<ref name="IJ" />}}
'''''Afarathu''''' was a sect of [[Selonian/Legends|Selonians]] extremists that terrorized the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] some four centuries before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==History==
{{Quote|A group of extremists calling themselves the ''Afarathu'' have made a pact with the Tribunals. Many of us know that this will soon make the ''Afarathu'' cocky, and soon they will begin raiding everyone with their stolen weapons.|A Selonian diplomat, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:SD">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|Selonian Diplomat|Corellia}}</ref>}}
The [[Selonian/Legends|Selonians]] of the ''Afarathu'' terrorist sect marauded the Corellian system four centuries before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> Their objective was to drive the [[Drall (planet)|Dralls]] and the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] from the worlds of the Corellian system because they considered them to be their home worlds.<ref name="CDAG" /> The sect was finally destroyed by the [[Corellian Jedi]] [[Keiran Halcyon]],<ref name="IJ" /><ref name="TNEC" /><ref name="TCSWE" /> in [[380 BBY/Legends|380 BBY]].<ref name="TNEC" />

In the next centuries, the ''Afarathu'' sect was all but forgotten until the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] used its specter to incite xenophobic reactions among the Human population of the Corellian system.<ref name="IJ" /><ref name="TCSWE" />

However, despite their destruction, the ''Afarathu'' cult rose from the ashes prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and was particularly active on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] after the Battle of Yavin.<ref name="SWG:AC" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> a Selonian diplomat traveled to the Corellian city of [[Doaba Guerfel/Legends|Doaba Guerfel]] in order to recruit a spacer to fight the ''Afarathu'' extremists at their [[Afarathu Cave|cave]] nearby.<ref name="SWG:SD" /> Around the same time, some ''Afarathu'' clashed with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces on Corellia.<ref name="SWG:V">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other}}Corellian Corvette Pre-Quest: "Lt. Velso"</ref>
